En todos lados el ACA me salva taller cerrado igual playero me soluciono. Agradecida total

(Translated by Google)
Everywhere I go, the ACA saves me; even when the workshop is closed, the gas station attendant always sorts it out. Totally grateful.

reviews.comment:
Necesitaba cambiar un foco de una óptica. A pesar de haber bastante gente me atendieron muy rápido y muy amablemente. Me fui con mi problema solucionado en diez minutos. Para cargar combustible, mejor ir con paciencia, va mucha gente antes de viajar y hacen medir presión de los neumáticos, lo que hace que sea todo más lento. De todas formas está muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
I needed to change a headlight bulb. Despite being quite busy, they served me very quickly and very kindly. I left with my problem solved in ten minutes. For fuel, it's best to be patient; a lot of people go there before traveling, and they check tire pressure, which slows everything down. Anyway, it's very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c05yejR3RRAB
